root_cause: Scheduler preemption is ineffective due to PodDisruptionBudget constraints
evidence: Representative scheduler message: 0/3 nodes are available: 3 Insufficient cpu. preemption: 0/3 nodes are available: 3 cannot evict pod as it would violate the PodDisruptionBudget.

causes.message: PodDisruptionBudget prevents eviction of candidate pods
Scheduler preemption attempts are blocked by PDB constraints
Pod cannot be scheduled despite preemption attempts

likely_causes: Too few replicas to allow safe eviction
High-priority pod cannot displace protected workloads
suggested_checks: Check replica counts of protected workloads
Consider relaxing PDB constraints if appropriate
